Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" ELSE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" END * bs.weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs LEFT OUTER JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" IN ('CO', 'WY') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/d0bbc38271fb282420ef841325ff3b7d2163b8139620e2e601549815afd4f41d/4c2a9c2b-8580-4456-950c-b4698a651ee8/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
